headline: Stifel Just Crowned CrowdStrike With a $660 Price Target. The Bull Case Just Got Louder
summary: Stifel analyst Adam Borg raised the firm’s price target on CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) to $660 from $480, maintaining a Buy rating ahead of the company’s fiscal Q1 2027 earnings report on June 3. The price target raise lands in the middle of a three-day analyst tug-of-war, sitting between KeyBanc’s aggressive bull call and DZ Bank’s notable ...
